heading: vectorSearch Operator Limitations
body:
The `vectorSearch` operator must be the top-level operator in your
queries. Therefore, you can't use the `vectorSearch` operator
inside the following MongoDB Search [MongoDB Search operators](operators-ref):

- [embeddedDocument](embedded-document-ref)

- [compound](compound-ref)

- [faceted navigation](fts-facet-ref)

You can't use the `vectorSearch` operator to query fields indexed
using a [index definition](avs-types-vector-search) type index.

You can't use the following [$search](pipe.$search) options with the
`vectorSearch` operator:

- [highlights](highlight-ref)

- [sorting](sort-ref)

- [How to Paginate the Results](fts-paginate-results)

  Instead, use [$skip](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/skip) and [$limit](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/limit) after the
  [$search](pipe.$search) stage.

You can't run [$search](pipe.$search) queries with the `vectorSearch`
operator in the MongoDB Search Playground.
